mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO session_metrics_raw ( database_id, collected_at, pid, username, databasename, client_addr, application_name, state, wait_event_type, wait_event, wait_class, bottleneck_cause, impact_level, wait_duration_sec, blocking_pid, query_type, query, query_start, query_age_sec, cpu_usage, memory_usage_mb, lock_type, lock_duration_ms, is_deadlock, created_at ) VALUES
(#{m.databaseId}, #{m.collectedAt}, #{m.pid}, #{m.username}, #{m.databasename}, #{m.clientAddr}, #{m.applicationName}, #{m.state}, #{m.waitEventType}, #{m.waitEvent}, #{m.waitClass}, #{m.bottleneckCause}, #{m.impactLevel}, #{m.waitDurationSec}, #{m.blockingPid}, #{m.queryType}, #{m.query}, #{m.queryStart}, #{m.queryAgeSec}, #{m.cpuUsage}, #{m.memoryUsageMb}, #{m.lockType}, #{m.lockDurationMs}, #{m.isDeadlock}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT pid, datid AS dbId, datname AS dbName, usename AS username, client_addr AS clientAddr, application_name AS applicationName, state, wait_event_type AS waitEventType, wait_event AS waitEvent, query_id AS queryId, query, query_start AS queryStart xact_start AS xactStart FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname IS NOT NULL
